description_long: This bar features a modern, minimalist design with a rectangular wooden structure and a flat, slightly sloped roof. The main bar area is recessed into the building, with a long wooden counter and several stools arranged in front. The interior is dark, with a few visible bottles and glasses on the counter, and the seating area is integrated into the structure. The exterior is clad in a wood-textured material, with a small, raised gray section on the roof, possibly for utilities or signage. The bar sits on a wide, light gray concrete platform that extends around the building, providing a clean, open space in front. There are no visible windows or exterior signage, and the entrance is an open, unobstructed passage directly into the bar area.
description: A modern, wood-clad bar with a recessed counter, stools, and a flat, sloped roof, set on a wide concrete platform. The design is minimalist, with no visible windows or signage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open bar area, counter, stools, and dark interior, with the wood-textured exterior and concrete platform clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the sloped roof, the open entrance, and the arrangement of stools along the bar counter.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wood-textured back wall, the raised gray roof section, and the concrete platform extending behind the building.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the thickness of the wood-textured walls, the raised roof section, and the lack of windows or exterior features.
attribute_entrance_type: open passage, no visible door, wood frame, no awning or decorative elements
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with rustic wood influences
